title: Chunk =  Random Block
description: If you enter a new chunk it will be a new random Block
body:
# Chunk RandomBlock Challenge
A fun and challenging Fabric mod that restricts your movement and survival to a single chunk at a time, while randomizing the world as you explore.
## 🚀 Features
### 1. 🧱 Chunk Randomization
Every time you enter a new chunk, its entire terrain is replaced with a **random solid block**. 
*   **Smart Filtering**: The mod automatically excludes "dangerous" or "fragile" blocks. No more falling into gravel or sand, and no torches or grass floating in the air.
*   **Solid Selection**: Includes full blocks, slabs, fences, walls, stairs, and glass.
### 2. 🚫 Mining Restriction
You are only allowed to break blocks within the chunk you are currently standing in. Trying to break blocks in neighboring chunks is blocked with a message.
### 3. ⏱️ BastiGHG Style Timer
A built-in timer displayed in the **Actionbar** (bottom-center) tracks your challenge progress.
*   Starts and pauses synchronized with the game challenge.
### 4. ⌨️ Commands
*   `/start`: Resumes the timer and activates all challenge rules (randomization and mining limits).
*   `/pause`: Pauses the timer and allows normal block breaking/exploration.
## 📥 Installation
1.  Download the JAR file for your specific Minecraft version.
2.  Install the **Fabric Loader**.
3.  Place the JAR file into your `.minecraft/mods` folder.
4.  (Optional) Install **Fabric API** (Required for the mod to function).
